params.amount: Amount of USDC to bet (must have approved this contract)
params.isYes: true = bet YES, false = bet NO

challenge().details: Resets outcome to UNRESOLVED so admin can re-submit

claim().details: Uses CEI pattern + ReentrancyGuard for safety

params._bettingDeadline: Unix timestamp — last moment to place bets
params._resolutionDeadline: Unix timestamp — admin must resolve before this

expireClaim().details: Anyone can call this after resolutionDeadline if market is still UNRESOLVED

returns.claimable: Amount the user can claim (0 if not eligible)

bet(bool,uint256).notice: Place a bet on YES or NO

challenge().notice: Anyone can challenge the submitted result within the challenge window

claim().notice: Claim winnings after market is finalized

expireClaim().notice: Refund all users if admin fails to resolve before resolutionDeadline

finalize().notice: Finalize the market after the challenge window passes without challenge

getClaimable(address).notice: Calculate how much a user can claim

getMarketInfo().notice: Get full market info in a single RPC call

getOdds().notice: Get current odds in basis points (e.g. 6700 = 67%)
